auth: caller-owned GOODREADS_COOKIE + fresh GOODREADS_CSRF_TOKEN; secrets not stored

404 — no live slug harvestable (JS-rendered Q&A); route shape unchanged

destructiveSkipped: POST /quotes/{slug}/remove (live) — removing a real quote is not cleanly reversible (re-add is bot-walled)

PUT /notes/{book_id}/share (live) — notes-privacy gated, not cleanly reversible
POST /quotes create (live) — bot-walled and would add real content

added: GET /search (canonical search; /search/search now documented as legacy redirect)
